content.full_text:
STATECRAFT, INC.
3368 Governor Drive, Suite 178F
San Diego, CA 92122
(619)452-9677

September 25, 1990

Mr. Kevin Braaten-Moen
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Re: Disclosure Statement

Dear Kevin:

Under separate cover I have sent my computer generated forms to Kim Taylor for approval. However, per our discussion during your recent seminar in San Diego, I submit these to you for content as follows:

Schedules A & C

1) If a contributor has made both monetary and non-monetary donations during the same period, may both schedules include the cumulative with a footnote, or must Schedule C say "See Schedule A for Cumulative" (or something similar)?

2) I noticed that you changed slightly how an intermediary is shown. Is the attached example still in compliance?

Schedule E

1) Since Credit Card payments include amounts Under $100, may those be summed together rather than itemized in the description of payment?

2) Also, how do you suggest showing a mix of travel costs and non-travel in a credit card statement?

You can reach me by phone at (619) 452-9677. Thank you for your assistance.

Very truly yours,

Sheryl Z. White

The image is completely blank, showing only white space with no visible text, numbers, or any other content.
